center.name: Otago Heads
center.summary: Otago Heads是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Crimson rosella，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: A disparate population occurs in North Queensland. Around 1910, a small number of crimson rosellas were released off the Otago Heads, New Zealand, along with eastern rosellas

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: A disparate population occurs in North Queensland. Around 1910, a small number of crimson rosellas were released off the Otago Heads, New Zealand, along with eastern rosellas
